variants._comment:: ($self$) 申请成为情侣 口上文
($self$) 拒绝成为情侣 口上文
($self$) 被拒绝成为情侣 口上文
($self$) 情侣关系破裂 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_1: $self$手指绞着衣角，低着头不敢看$target$的眼睛。"那个……一直以来受了你很多照顾……我……可以一直待在你身边吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_2: $self$深吸了一口气，声音细若蚊蝇："我对$target$……不仅仅是朋友那种喜欢……"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_3: $self$递出一封信后转身就跑，信封上画着一颗笨拙的小爱心。
zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_4: $self$脸红得像熟透的苹果，支支吾吾半天说不出一句完整的话。"就是……那个……我想和你……交往……"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_5: $self$突然抓住了$target$的手，眼神坚定而热烈。"别装傻了，你知道我喜欢你的，对吧？我们在一起吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_6: $self$双手叉腰，把脸凑到$target$面前。"喂，$target$，做我的男朋友怎么样？我保证不会让你无聊的。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_propose_7: $self$从背后抱住$target$，脸颊贴在对方的背上。"我不想再只做朋友了……我想做你最特别的那个人。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_set_1: $self$看着两人的手紧紧牵在一起，嘴角止不住地上扬。"感觉像在做梦一样……以后请多指教啦，亲爱的。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_set_2: $self$轻轻靠在$target$的肩膀上，闭上了眼睛。"只要在你身边，就觉得什么都不怕了。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_set_3: $self$兴奋地拿出手机，把两人的合照设成了壁纸。"这可是官方认证哦！不许反悔！"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_set_4: $self$有些害羞地改了称呼："那……以后我就叫你……老公？"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_set_5: $self$认真地凝视着$target$，眼神温柔得仿佛能滴出水来。"谢谢你选择了我……我会努力成为配得上你的人。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_set_6: $self$紧紧拥抱着$target$，仿佛要把对方揉进自己的身体里。"终于抓到你了……我绝对不会放手的。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refuse_1: $self$有些为难地避开了视线，轻轻咬着嘴唇。"抱歉……我现在还没有做好开始一段关系的准备。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refuse_2: $self$苦笑着摇了摇头，向后退了一步。"如果是开玩笑的话，这个玩笑有点过头了哦。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refuse_3: $self$叹了口气，眼神中带着一丝歉意。"我觉得……我们还是维持现在的关系比较好。对不起。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refuse_4: $self$面无表情地看着$target$，语气没有任何起伏。"我没那种想法，希望你以后不要再提了。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refuse_5: $self$皱起眉头，似乎对这个话题感到不适。"我不觉得我们合适，别浪费时间了。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refuse_6: $self$毫不留情地抽回了自己的手，转身离开。"这种事，你想都不要想。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refused_1: $self$愣了一下，随即勉强挤出一个比哭还难看的笑容。"啊……是这样啊……哈哈，我就随口一问，别当真。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refused_2: $self$眼里的光芒瞬间黯淡下去，低着头看着自己的脚尖。"对不起……给你造成困扰了……"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refused_3: $self$迅速转过身去，声音带着明显的颤抖。"没关系！真的没关系……我要先走了。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refused_4: $self$像是被抽走了所有力气，呆呆地站在原地。"为什么……明明我那么努力了……"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refused_5: $self$眼泪夺眶而出，捂着脸跑开了。"笨蛋！$target$是个大笨蛋！"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_refused_6: $self$自嘲地笑了笑，眼角却滑过一滴泪珠。"也是呢……我这种人……怎么可能有人喜欢。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_break_1: $self$把所有合照都摔在地上，指着门口怒吼。"滚！我再也不想看到你！"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_break_2: $self$冷冷地盯着$target$，眼神陌生得可怕。"我们结束了。从今以后，你是你，我是我。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_break_3: $self$摘下戒指扔在桌上，发出一声清脆的声响。"受够了……这一切都让我感到恶心。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_break_4: $self$疲惫地闭上眼睛，声音沙哑。"太累了……我们放过彼此吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_break_5: $self$开始默默地收拾行李，动作机械而麻木。"已经没有什么好说的了。"
zh-cn.relationship_couple_break_6: $self$看着$target$，就像看着一团空气。"随便你吧，你想怎么样都行，只要别来烦我。"

en-us.relationship_couple_propose_1: $self$ twists the hem of her shirt, head lowered, avoiding $target$'s eyes. "Um... you've taken such good care of me all this time... Can I... stay by your side forever?"
en-us.relationship_couple_propose_2: $self$ takes a deep breath, her voice barely a whisper: "My feelings for $target$... are more than just friendship..."
en-us.relationship_couple_propose_3: $self$ hands over a letter and immediately runs away. A clumsy little heart is drawn on the envelope.
en-us.relationship_couple_propose_4: $self$'s face turns red as a ripe apple, stumbling over her words. "It's just... um... I want to... go out with you..."
en-us.relationship_couple_propose_5: $self$ suddenly grabs $target$'s hand, her gaze firm and passionate. "Stop playing dumb. You know I like you, right? Let's be together!"
en-us.relationship_couple_propose_6: $self$ puts her hands on her hips and leans in close to $target$. "Hey, $target$, how about being my boyfriend? I promise you won't be bored."
en-us.relationship_couple_propose_7: $self$ hugs $target$ from behind, resting her cheek against his back. "I don't want to be just friends anymore... I want to be the most special person to you."
en-us.relationship_couple_set_1: $self$ looks at their tightly interlaced hands, the corners of her mouth twitching upwards. "It feels like a dream... Please take care of me from now on, darling."
en-us.relationship_couple_set_2: $self$ leans gently on $target$'s shoulder and closes her eyes. "As long as I'm by your side, I feel like I have nothing to fear."
en-us.relationship_couple_set_3: $self$ excitedly pulls out her phone and sets their photo as the wallpaper. "This makes it official! No take-backs!"
en-us.relationship_couple_set_4: $self$ shyly changes how she addresses him: "So... can I call you... Hubby from now on?"
en-us.relationship_couple_set_5: $self$ stares earnestly at $target$, her eyes so gentle they seem to melt. "Thank you for choosing me... I'll work hard to be someone worthy of you."
en-us.relationship_couple_set_6: $self$ hugs $target$ tightly, as if trying to merge into his body. "I finally caught you... and I'm never letting go."
en-us.relationship_couple_refuse_1: $self$ avoids eye contact, looking troubled, and gently bites her lip. "Sorry... I'm not ready to start a relationship right now."
en-us.relationship_couple_refuse_2: $self$ shakes her head with a bitter smile, taking a step back. "If this is a joke, it's going a bit too far."
en-us.relationship_couple_refuse_3: $self$ sighs, a hint of apology in her eyes. "I think... it's better if we stay as we are. I'm sorry."
en-us.relationship_couple_refuse_4: $self$ looks at $target$ expressionlessly, her tone flat. "I don't see us that way, and I hope you won't bring it up again."
en-us.relationship_couple_refuse_5: $self$ frowns, seeming uncomfortable with the topic. "I don't think we're a good match. Let's not waste our time."
en-us.relationship_couple_refuse_6: $self$ ruthlessly pulls her hand away and turns to leave. "Don't even think about it."
en-us.relationship_couple_refused_1: $self$ freezes for a moment, then forces a smile that looks worse than crying. "Ah... is that so... Haha, I was just asking, don't take it seriously."
en-us.relationship_couple_refused_2: $self$ eyes instantly lose their light as she looks down at her toes. "I'm sorry... for causing you trouble..."
en-us.relationship_couple_refused_3: $self$ quickly turns around, her voice clearly trembling. "It's okay! Really, it's okay... I have to go now."
en-us.relationship_couple_refused_4: $self$ stands there dazed, as if all her strength has been drained away. "Why... when I tried so hard..."
en-us.relationship_couple_refused_5: $self$ bursts into tears, covering her face as she runs away. "Idiot! $target$ is a big idiot!"
en-us.relationship_couple_refused_6: $self$ laughs self-deprecatingly, a tear sliding from the corner of her eye. "I guess so... How could anyone like someone like me."
en-us.relationship_couple_break_1: $self$ throws all their photos on the ground and points at the door, screaming. "Get out! I never want to see you again!"
en-us.relationship_couple_break_2: $self$ stares coldly at $target$, her eyes terrifyingly unfamiliar. "We are done. From now on, you are you, and I am me."
en-us.relationship_couple_break_3: $self$ takes off the ring and throws it on the table with a crisp sound. "I've had enough... This all makes me sick."
en-us.relationship_couple_break_4: $self$ closes her eyes wearily, her voice hoarse. "I'm so tired... let's just let each other go."
en-us.relationship_couple_break_5: $self$ begins to pack her luggage silently, her movements mechanical and numb. "There's nothing left to say."
en-us.relationship_couple_break_6: $self$ looks at $target$ as if looking at thin air. "Whatever. Do what you want, just don't bother me."
